Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class FlexQueueItem

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.FlexQueueItem
public class FlexQueueItem extends SObject

Java class for FlexQueueItem complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlexQueueItem">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AsyncApexJob" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}AsyncApexJob" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AsyncApexJobId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlexQueueItemId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JobPosition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JobType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
